permission_kinds.summary: Read declared data within the pack payload.
Write declared profile data through governed profile paths.
Write save data through governed save paths.
Write cache data through governed cache paths.
Read an explicitly selected user file.
Write an explicitly selected user file.
Open declared outbound network connections.
Listen for declared inbound network connections.
Launch a declared external process.
Execute native code inside a trusted provider boundary.
Load a dynamic library under future signed native provider policy.
Access clipboard data through a platform provider.
Access input devices through a provider.
Access audio output or capture through a provider.
Access renderer or presentation provider surfaces.
Invoke registered commands through command law.
Provide registered commands through command law.
Provide a provider descriptor governed by provider law.
Provide a module descriptor governed by module law.
Contribute declared registry data through schema and overlay policy.
Request world-state mutation through lawful process data, never direct mutation.
Generate declared artifacts with provenance and identity.
